universe: dev-agent authored PRs (investigate_bug/feature_request) recorded in agent_commands

reverted_prs.title: fix(nclaw-dashboard): Agent 'siti-router' on siti-vps is reporting process_stale: heartbeat is 453s stale (threshold 360s). A Tier-1 restart was already attempted or is not applicable for this symptom

notes: Universe is dev-agent authored PRs in agent_commands — the precise set the fleet shipped. claude-code-action PRs (the retired-reviewer replacement) are NOT in agent_commands and are a known gap; extend by classifying merged PRs by Co-Authored-By trailer.

Revert detection scans revert-titled PRs + the last 200 default-branch commits per repo. A revert older than 200 commits back, or one that neither names the SHA/PR# nor quotes the title, is missed (under-counts).
autonomous dispatch wound down ~2026-05-29; this is the historical active window.
